calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Berg for and with Helen Corse Berg. Margaret Elliot for laura Corse and Larry Corse Moss (Petitioners).

The Court stated that although there is a waiver of placing the assets in the Trust, that it can not do that and that the will provides that the residue needs to go to the Trust. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Continued To Mar-10-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Continued To Apr-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Elliott and Allison Fries for Laura Corse. Robert Berg for and with Helen Corse Berg.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to granting of the petition, the Decedent's intent, discovery and setting of an evidentiary hearing. The matter was continued to April 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send the Parties to a settlement conference. The Court will send notice of the time and place of the settlement conference when set.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Elliott for Laura Moss Corse (Surviving Spouse). Robert Berg for and with Helen Corse Berg (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the tangible personal property, referred to paragraph 1.4 and 1.6 of the will, the Trust, the art work, the value of the apartment complex, the amount of the bond, and the household furnishings. Ms. Elliott stated that she had Mr. Mellon's declination to act. The Court granted Laura Moss Corse' petition (subject to review of the order). Bond was set at $50,000.00. The Court encouraged the Parties to try and work things out.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5520. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
